name: Leg Extension (Machine)
setup: Sit on leg extension machine, back flat at 90 degrees
Ankles behind roller pad (pad on top of feet near shin)
Adjust backrest so knee aligns with pivot point of machine
execution: Extend legs until knees are straight (not locked)
Squeeze quads at top for 1-2 seconds
Lower under control, don't let stack drop
common_mistakes: Locking knees at full extension (joint stress)
Hips lifting off seat (using body English)
cues: Point your toes to increase quad engagement
breathing: Exhale on concentric, inhale on eccentric

recommended_rir.description: Leave 2-3 reps in reserve for safety
